templates.title: Infrastructure
templates.description: Complete network infrastructure stack with AdGuard Home for DNS filtering and ad blocking, plus Nginx Proxy Manager for reverse proxy management with SSL certificates
templates.note: Requires external network 'horizon_network' to be created first. AdGuard Home will be accessible on port 3000 for initial setup, then port 80. Nginx Proxy Manager admin interface on port 81.
templates.name: infrastructure

env.name: TZ
env.label: Timezone
env.description: Set your local timezone (e.g., Europe/Rome, America/New_York, Asia/Tokyo)

env.name: NPM_HTTP_PORT
env.label: Nginx Proxy Manager HTTP Port
env.description: HTTP port for Nginx Proxy Manager

env.name: NPM_HTTPS_PORT
env.label: Nginx Proxy Manager HTTPS Port
env.description: HTTPS port for Nginx Proxy Manager

env.name: NPM_ADMIN_PORT
env.label: Nginx Proxy Manager Admin Port
env.description: Admin interface port for Nginx Proxy Manager

env.name: NPM_DISABLE_IPV6
env.label: Nginx Proxy Manager Disable IPv6
env.description: Disable IPv6 support (recommended for most home networks)

templates.title: Database
templates.description: Database infrastructure stack with PostgreSQL, MySQL, Redis, and database administration tools for application data storage and management
templates.note: Requires external network 'horizon_network' to be created first. Provides multiple database engines and management interfaces for application backends.
templates.name: database

env.name: TZ
env.label: Timezone
env.description: Set your local timezone for database timestamps and scheduling (e.g., Europe/Rome, America/New_York, Asia/Tokyo)

templates.title: Monitoring
templates.description: Comprehensive monitoring stack with Prometheus, Grafana, Node Exporter, and Dozzle for metrics collection, visualization, and real-time log monitoring
templates.note: Requires external network 'horizon_network' to be created first. Includes system metrics monitoring and Docker container log viewing.
templates.name: monitoring

env.name: TZ
env.label: Timezone
env.description: Set your local timezone (e.g., Europe/Rome, America/New_York, Asia/Tokyo)

env.name: DOZZLE_HTTP_PORT
env.label: Dozzle HTTP Port
env.description: HTTP port for Dozzle log viewer interface

templates.title: Multimedia
templates.description: Complete multimedia management stack featuring Immich for photo/video management, Jellyfin media server, and supporting services with PostgreSQL database
templates.note: Requires external network 'horizon_network' to be created first. Includes photo backup, media streaming, and content organization tools.
templates.name: multimedia

env.name: DB_USERNAME
env.label: PostgreSQL Database Username
env.description: Username for the PostgreSQL database used by multimedia services

env.name: DB_PASSWORD
env.label: PostgreSQL Database Password
env.description: Password for the PostgreSQL database (change from default for security)

env.name: DB_DATABASE_NAME
env.label: Database Name
env.description: Name of the database for multimedia services (primarily Immich)

templates.title: Home Automation
templates.description: Home Assistant Core deployment for comprehensive smart home automation, device integration, and IoT management
templates.note: Provides local control of smart home devices with support for hundreds of integrations. Access via web interface for configuration and automation setup.
templates.name: homeautomation

env.name: TZ
env.label: Timezone
env.description: Set your local timezone for accurate automation scheduling (e.g., Europe/Rome, America/New_York, Asia/Tokyo)

templates.title: Tools
templates.description: Essential utility tools collection including file managers, system utilities, network tools, and development aids for homelab administration
templates.note: Requires external network 'horizon_network' to be created first. Provides various administrative and utility services for homelab management.
templates.name: tools

env.name: TZ
env.label: Timezone
env.description: Set your local timezone for proper time-based functionality (e.g., Europe/Rome, America/New_York, Asia/Tokyo)

templates.title: Web applications
templates.note: Requires external network 'horizon_network' to be created first.
templates.name: webapp
